title: Yamato Stands Against Kaido
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Black Maria, Unknown person #4, King as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: _Must be taking a lot out of you.}

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I plan on settling this quickly!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You think that'll make me give up?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: So, your real body gets injured too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is going to be a piece of cake!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: These massive limbs are just bigger targets!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you've finally noticed my legs are poison tipped...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm a martial artist at heart,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And it's not like I need to hold back...

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 21 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
